page_metadata.biotools__summary: FIST (Fast Imputation of Spatially-resolved transcriptomes by graph-regularized Tensor completion) is a graph-regularized tensor completion model for imputing the missing mRNA expressions in sptRNA-seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FIST (Fast Imputation of Spatially-resolved transcriptomes by graph-regularized Tensor completion) is a graph-regularized tensor completion model for imputing the missing mRNA expressions in sptRNA-seq data.
